subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Verily, the Chief of the Monotheists and the Support of the Pure-hearted bears the name of the Master of the Devout, the Ornament of the Worshippers, who hath believed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم ان سید الموحدین و سند المخلصین سمی سید الساجدین زین العابدین الذی آمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences
